About

Crafting
Impossible
Worlds

I'm Giorgi Tomaradze — an 18-year-old 3D generalist based in Georgia, and I built every skill I have by myself, frame by frame.

What started as pure curiosity became an obsession: tearing apart how blockbuster VFX works, then rebuilding it in Blender from the ground up. Mechs, creatures, environments, compositing — I chase every discipline because I believe great 3D artists don't specialize in one thing. They understand everything.

I'm early in my career and I know it. But the gap between where I am and where the industry sets the bar? That's not a wall — it's a project list.

Open to freelance & opportunities
